svg.title: Drop 001 Poster Sticker Set With QR
svg.desc: A QR sticker sheet made from the cleaned Drop 001 poster set. Poster art is inlined for GitHub-safe rendering.

g.text: THE NEXT CITY IS US / PROJECT-COLUMBUS
HOPEWELL CEREMONIAL EARTHWORKS / RAISED TWO THOUSAND YEARS BACK
WATER / POWER / LAND / TAX / COMPUTE / DATA

svg.text: POSTER STICKERS / TRANSIT ADDED / QR CORNERS
